title: Cross-Strait Relations at a Volatile Impasse
summary: This represents worth recalling that on December 29, 2025, China conducted a two-day large-scale joint military exercise, “Justice Mission 2025,” along the Taiwan Strait.
contents:
## Source Context

OSINT collection from the @MNDChina Twitter/X account, focused on China PLA military exercises Taiwan strait, surfaces a recent news report linked below. The source @MNDChina consistently covers this beat and analysts often cross-reference outside reporting against the account.

## Reported Development

The cited article, **Cross-Strait Relations at a Volatile Impasse**, published on 2026-04-30, describes activity that aligns with the source's monitoring scope. Key details from the reporting follow.

> This represents worth recalling that on December 29, 2025, China conducted a two-day large-scale joint military exercise, “Justice Mission 2025,” along the Taiwan Strait.
